description:
SDR Rx/Tx software for Airspy, Airspy HF+, BladeRF, HackRF, LimeSDR, PlutoSDR, RTL-SDR, SDRplay RSP1 and FunCube


New MeshCore plugins
Thanks to @gretel we now have a pair of Rx/Tx plugins to play with MeshCore. MeshCore protocol is a LoRa based off grid mesh system similar to Meshtastic. More information about the plugins Rx here Tx here. Pull request: #2775
Other changes and fixes:
- Enable native Fobos SDR source plugin on Linux by @UR4MCB in #2745
- Fix libunwind detection on arm by @df7cb in #2747
- Make Linux Fobos SDR runtimes optional at build time by @UR4MCB in #2763
- Use libunwind on all architectures by @dawkagaming in #2767
- Show devices in use in device selection dialog by @rgetz in #2770
- Disable AVX instructions in limesuite for flatpak and snap by @srcejon in #2772
- Fix SoapyUHD TX signal path and MCR pinning by @gretel in #2776
New Contributors
- @dawkagaming made their first contribution in #2767
- @gretel made their first contribution in #2775
Full Changelog: v7.26.1...v7.27.0
